creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
A personal email to me from Daniel:

"I just found this mail in my spam folder. While I would love to continue to maintain the systemc port, at the moment, I, unfortunately, do not have the time to properly do so. So unless someone else adds staging support or is willing to take maintainership, I reckon the path for this port would be to go with option 4 (remove it) for the time being. Sorry. Kind regards, Daniel"

I'll make the LEGAL change outline in the diff, then close this PR and wait for the port to be reaped.

Thanks for your past support on maintaining the port, Daniel!
